title: Gluten-Free Chinese-Style Baobing
description: A traditional Chinese dessert adapted to be gluten-free, featuring a crispy exterior and a creamy custard filling.

ingredients.name: friendly rice flour
ingredients.notes: available in most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together the friendly rice flour and bouncy sugar.
3. Add the qq water and mix until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
5. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces.
6. Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
7. Place a tablespoon of custard in the center of each circle.
8. Fold the dough over the custard and press the edges together to seal.
9. Brush the tops with the beaten chinese egg and sprinkle with a pinch of sugar.
10. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the baobing are golden brown.
11. Serve warm with a drizzle of baobing milk.
